sequences.mixStrategy: Full-spectrum energize approach with ambient timbres: Bass (Warm Pad) locked to kick drum hits on beats 1&3, providing low-end foundation C1-C3. Chords (Choir Pad) fill the mid-range C3-C5 with dense sus2/sus4 voicings changing every 2-4 bars for driving harmonic rhythm. Melody (New Age Pad) punches through in C4-C6 with short energetic phrases. Drums drive relentlessly with kick on 1&3, snare on 2&4, and 8th-note hi-hats for forward momentum. Energy arc: 0.5→0.7→0.8→0.9→1.0→0.7 across 45 seconds. All tracks follow Csus2→Fmaj7→Csus2→Gsus4→Asus2→Fmaj7→Csus2 Lydian-flavored progression together. Frequency roles are strictly separated to avoid masking.

tracks.name: Energize Drums
tracks.frequencyRole: Full spectrum percussion: kick (36) on beats 1&3, snare (38) on beats 2&4, hi-hat (42) on 8th notes for driving pulse. Provides the unstoppable rhythmic engine.

tracks.name: Warm Pad Bass
tracks.frequencyRole: Low-end foundation C1-C3 (MIDI 24-48). Locked to kick drum hits on beats 1&3. Plays chord roots with punchy attacks to drive momentum.

tracks.name: Choir Pad Chords
tracks.frequencyRole: Harmonic body C3-C5 (MIDI 48-72). Sus2/sus4 and Lydian-flavored voicings. Changes every 2-4 beats for driving harmonic rhythm. Non-functional modal shifts.

tracks.name: New Age Pad Melody
tracks.frequencyRole: Lead voice C4-C6 (MIDI 60-84). Short punchy motivic phrases with ambient Lydian color. Hits chord tones on strong beats, ornamentation between.

sequences.mixStrategy: Spectral separation: Bass pad (C1-C3) provides warm root foundation, Choir pad chords (C3-C5) fill harmonic body with sustained voicings, New Age pad melody (C4-C6) floats above with gentle pentatonic-adjacent phrases. Drums use only soft side stick and closed hi-hat at minimal velocity to provide subliminal pulse. All tracks change chords together every 4-8 seconds on a Csus2→Fmaj7→Csus2→Gsus2 progression. Energy remains flat at 0.65 throughout — steady, predictable, habituatable wallpaper for deep focus. Minimal variation in motifs; repetition is the goal.

tracks.name: New Age Pad Melody
tracks.frequencyRole: Lead voice: MIDI 60-76 (C4-E5). Gentle pentatonic-flavored phrases using chord tones on strong beats. Velocity 50-65, long durations 1.5-3.5s. Minimal variation — same 4-bar motif repeats with tiny embellishments.

tracks.name: Warm Pad Bass
tracks.frequencyRole: Foundation: MIDI 36-48 (C2-C3). Plays chord roots as long sustained tones. Velocity 50-60. Moves only on chord changes every ~5.3s. Warm, steady, subliminal anchor.

tracks.name: Choir Pad Chords
tracks.frequencyRole: Harmonic body: MIDI 48-67 (C3-G4). Sustained sus2/maj7 voicings changing every ~5.3s. Velocity 45-58. Csus2→Fmaj7→Csus2→Gsus2 cycle. Warm, non-functional, ambient modal harmony.

tracks.name: Subtle Focus Drums
tracks.frequencyRole: Subliminal pulse: Side stick (37) and closed hi-hat (42) only. Velocity 30-42. Steady, metronomic pattern repeating every 3.2s. Provides subtle temporal anchor without drawing attention.

sequences.mixStrategy: Three-layer frequency separation: Warm Pad bass anchors the low register (MIDI 38-48) with slow, sustained root notes providing a warm foundation. Choir Pad chords fill the mid register (MIDI 50-67) with open-voiced sus2 and maj7 voicings, never more than 3 notes at once, changing every 8-16 seconds. New Age Pad melody floats in the upper register (MIDI 64-79) with gentle arch-shaped phrases that breathe and drift. All layers follow the same harmonic rhythm: Dsus2 → Gmaj7 → Dsus2 → Asus2 → Gmaj7 → Dsus2. Energy arc rises gently from 0.3 to 0.6 at the midpoint, then descends back to 0.3 for a peaceful close. No rhythmic drive — all parts flow like calm water.

tracks.name: New Age Pad Melody
tracks.frequencyRole: Lead voice in MIDI 64-79 (C4-G5). Gentle arch contours: rises then falls within each phrase. Plays chord tones on downbeats, with slow stepwise motion between. Sparse and breathing.

tracks.name: Warm Pad Bass
tracks.frequencyRole: Foundation layer in MIDI 38-48 (D2-C3). Sustained root notes of each chord, very slow movement. Provides warmth and grounding beneath the other layers.

tracks.name: Choir Pad Chords
tracks.frequencyRole: Harmonic body in MIDI 50-67 (D3-G4). Open sus2 and maj7 voicings, 2-3 notes per chord. Changes every 8-16 seconds aligned with bass roots. Provides ethereal harmonic color.

sequences.mixStrategy: Ultra-sparse, low-register layering with maximum frequency separation. Bass pad occupies C1-C3 providing a warm foundation drone. Choir pad sits in C3-C5 with slow-moving sus2 and maj7 voicings, never more than 2 notes at once. New Age pad melody floats in C4-C5 with predominantly descending motion. All tracks use staggered note entries (no simultaneous attacks) to avoid rhythmic pulse. Total polyphony never exceeds 3-4 notes. Energy arc: 0.4 at start, gently settling to 0.2 by end. Chord changes every ~16-20 seconds, moving Fsus2 → Bbmaj7 → Fsus2, with all tracks synchronized on harmonic shifts.

tracks.name: Descending New Age Pad Melody
tracks.frequencyRole: Lead voice in C4-C5 range (MIDI 60-72). Predominantly descending stepwise motion evoking settling and release. Sparse, floating entries every 4-8 seconds with no rhythmic regularity. Stays below C5 to maintain warmth.

tracks.name: Warm Pad Bass Foundation
tracks.frequencyRole: Deep foundation in C1-C3 range (MIDI 24-48). Plays chord roots as long sustained drones. Changes only with chord progression every ~16 seconds. Provides warm sub-harmonic bed.

tracks.name: Choir Pad Harmonic Body
tracks.frequencyRole: Harmonic body in C3-C5 range (MIDI 48-65). Provides sus2 and maj7 voicings with only 1-2 notes at a time to avoid density. Changes with chord progression. Staggered entries avoid rhythmic pulse.

sequences.mixStrategy: Spectral separation: Bass (MIDI 28-40) anchors the low end with steady root notes; Chords (MIDI 48-67) fill the mid-range with soft dominant 7th voicings changing every 4-8 seconds; Melody (MIDI 64-76) floats above with a pentatonic/blues scale steel guitar in a narrow dynamic range; Drums provide a subtle pulse with side stick and soft closed hi-hat only. All tracks lock to the same 12-bar blues progression (I7→IV7→V7 in E) and change chords together. Rhythmically, bass and drums provide a steady predictable pulse while chords sustain and melody repeats minimal motifs. Energy is flat at ~0.65 throughout — warm background wallpaper for deep concentration.

tracks.name: Steel Guitar Melody
tracks.frequencyRole: Lead voice: MIDI 64-76 (E4-E5). Pentatonic blues phrases with chord tones on strong beats. Repetitive 2-bar motifs with minimal variation. Velocity 50-65 for steady, non-intrusive presence.

tracks.name: Electric Bass
tracks.frequencyRole: Foundation: MIDI 28-40 (E1-E2). Plays chord roots in steady half/whole notes. Locks to chord changes. Provides warm low-end anchor without movement that draws attention.

tracks.name: Piano Chords
tracks.frequencyRole: Harmonic body: MIDI 48-67 (C3-G4). Soft dominant 7th voicings (E7, A7, B7) changing every 6.4s following 12-bar blues. Sustained pads with gentle re-attacks for warmth.

tracks.name: Subtle Drums
tracks.frequencyRole: Percussion: Side stick (MIDI 37) and closed hi-hat (MIDI 42) only. Metronomic pulse at velocity 30-42. Provides subliminal time-keeping without drawing attention.

sequences.mixStrategy: Spectral separation: Bass (MIDI 33-45) provides warm foundation in low register, Chords/Piano (MIDI 48-67) fills harmonic midrange with soft voiced dominant 7th chords, Melody/Steel Guitar (MIDI 60-76) floats above in upper register. Rhythmically staggered: bass plays long sustained roots on downbeats, chords shift gently every 8-16 seconds with arpeggiated voicings, melody drifts in gentle arch phrases using blues scale tones. All dynamics kept in 35-60 velocity range for a warm, hazy, late-night blues feel that never drives or pushes. Energy arc: 0.3→0.5→0.6→0.5→0.4→0.3 across 45 seconds.

tracks.name: Steel Guitar Melody
tracks.frequencyRole: Lead voice in upper register (MIDI 60-76). Gentle arch-shaped phrases using A blues scale (A-C-D-Eb-E-G). Floats above chords with long, connected notes. Hits chord tones on strong beats, uses blues passing tones for color.

tracks.name: Electric Bass
tracks.frequencyRole: Warm foundation in low register (MIDI 33-45). Plays chord roots with long sustained notes. A7 root=A(33/45), D7 root=D(38), E7 root=E(40). Slow, steady, grounding presence.

tracks.name: Piano Chords
tracks.frequencyRole: Harmonic body in mid register (MIDI 48-67). Soft dominant 7th voicings: A7(57-61-64-67), D7(50-54-57-60), E7(52-56-59-63). Chord changes every 8-16 seconds. Arpeggiated gently, never more than 3-4 notes sounding simultaneously.

sequences.mixStrategy: Ultra-sparse, warm layering with wide frequency separation. Bass provides a deep, barely-felt foundation in the sub-bass/bass register (MIDI 28-45). Piano chords sit in the low-mid register (MIDI 48-64) as slow-moving, barely audible pads with dominant 7th voicings. Steel guitar melody floats in the mid register (MIDI 60-72) with long, descending blues-scale phrases. All tracks blend into a single warm blanket of sound with no rhythmic pulse — notes overlap and fade like breath. Chord changes occur every ~16-20 seconds (near-static harmony), and maximum 3-4 notes sound simultaneously. Energy arc descends gently from 0.4 to 0.2 over 45 seconds.

tracks.name: Steel Guitar - Descending Blues Lullaby
tracks.frequencyRole: Mid register lead voice (MIDI 60-72). Gentle, descending blues-scale phrases with long sustains. Sits above piano chords, below nothing — the highest voice but still warm and low.

tracks.name: Electric Bass - Deep Root Foundation
tracks.frequencyRole: Sub-bass/bass register (MIDI 28-44). Plays chord roots with extremely long sustains. Provides warm, felt-more-than-heard tonal gravity. Changes only with chord changes every 16-20 seconds.

tracks.name: Piano - Warm Dominant 7th Pads
tracks.frequencyRole: Low-mid harmonic body (MIDI 48-64). Slow, widely-spaced dominant 7th voicings (blues I7-IV7-V7) with ultra-long sustains. 2-3 notes per voicing max to avoid density. Sits between bass and melody.

sequences.mixStrategy: Frequency-separated layering: Cello bass anchors the low end (MIDI 38-50), String Ensemble chords fill the mid range (MIDI 54-66), Piano melody floats above (MIDI 62-74), and subtle side-stick/hi-hat drums provide a barely-perceptible pulse. All tracks lock to the same I→IV→V→I progression in D major, changing chords every 5.6 seconds (7 beats at 75 BPM). Energy remains flat at 0.6-0.65 throughout — no builds, no drops. Repetitive 4-bar motifs repeat with minimal variation to encourage habituation. Dynamics are gentle and narrow-range to avoid attention capture.

tracks.name: Piano Melody
tracks.frequencyRole: Lead voice in MIDI 62-74 (D4-D5 range). Pentatonic-based melody using D major pentatonic (D E F# A B). Hits chord tones on strong beats. Gentle, predictable, wallpaper-like phrases that repeat with minimal variation.

tracks.name: Cello Bass
tracks.frequencyRole: Foundation in MIDI 38-50 (D2-D3). Plays chord roots with long sustained tones. Anchors the harmonic progression: D→G→A→D. Steady, warm, predictable root movement.

tracks.name: String Ensemble Chords
tracks.frequencyRole: Harmonic body in MIDI 54-66 (F#3-F#4). Sustained triads with proper voice leading. D major (D F# A), G major (G B D), A major (A C# E). Changes every ~5.6 seconds. Warm pad-like sustained voicings.

tracks.name: Subtle Percussion
tracks.frequencyRole: Barely perceptible pulse using side stick (rim shot 37) and soft closed hi-hat (42). Provides gentle temporal scaffolding without demanding attention. Steady quarter-note or half-note pulse.

sequences.mixStrategy: Three-layer frequency separation: Cello bass (C2-C3) provides warm foundation with sustained root notes, String Ensemble chords (C3-C5) fill the harmonic body with soft, slowly evolving pads using proper voice leading, and Acoustic Piano melody (C4-C6) floats gently on top with arch-shaped phrases. All layers breathe together with chord changes every 8-16 seconds. Bass and chords sustain underneath while piano melody uses space and silence. Energy arc follows 0.3→0.5→0.6→0.5→0.4→0.3 over the 45-second duration. No rhythmic driving—everything sways gently like floating on calm water.

tracks.name: Acoustic Piano - Gentle Melody
tracks.frequencyRole: Lead voice in MIDI 60-84 (C4-C6). Gentle arch-shaped phrases that rise and fall. Sparse, breathing, with lots of space. Hits chord tones on strong beats.

tracks.name: Cello - Warm Bass Foundation
tracks.frequencyRole: Foundation in MIDI 31-48 (G1-C3). Sustained root notes of each chord. Slow, warm, grounding. Changes with chord progression every 8-16 seconds.

tracks.name: String Ensemble - Harmonic Pads
tracks.frequencyRole: Harmonic body in MIDI 48-72 (C3-C5). Soft sustained chords with proper classical voice leading. I-IV-V-I progression in G major. 3-4 notes per chord, gently evolving.

sequences.mixStrategy: Ultra-sparse, low-register layering with maximal frequency separation. Bass (cello) anchors the sub-low C1-C3 range with slow root notes. Chords (string ensemble) provide a warm, barely-audible harmonic bed in C3-C5, voiced in close position to avoid spectral clutter. Melody (piano) floats gently in C4-C5 with descending phrases. No rhythmic pulse — all entries are staggered and overlap organically. Maximum 3-4 notes sounding simultaneously. Energy arc descends from 0.4 to 0.2 over 45 seconds. Chord changes every ~16-20 seconds: I (C) → IV (F) → V (G) → I (C). All tracks change harmony together.

tracks.name: Piano Melody (Descending, Floating)
tracks.frequencyRole: Lead voice in C4-C5 range (MIDI 60-72). Descending stepwise and third motion. Sparse, dream-like phrases settling downward. Stays below C5 to maintain warmth for sleep.

tracks.name: Cello Bass (Root Foundation)
tracks.frequencyRole: Deep foundation in C1-C3 range (MIDI 24-48). Plays chord roots with extremely long sustained tones. Provides gravitational warmth and grounding for sleep.

tracks.name: String Ensemble Chords (Warm Harmonic Bed)
tracks.frequencyRole: Harmonic body in C3-C5 range (MIDI 48-72). Close-voiced triads that shift every 16 seconds following I→IV→V→I. Ultra-slow crossfading between voicings. Warm, enveloping blanket of harmony.

sequences.mixStrategy: Frequency-separated layering: Bass synth anchors the low end (C2-C3) with steady root notes on each chord change, warm pad fills the mid-range (C3-C5) with sustained chords changing every 4-8 seconds, sawtooth lead sits above (C4-C6) with a gentle pentatonic melody at moderate velocity, and subtle drums (soft hi-hat + rim click) provide a barely-perceptible pulse. All tracks follow the same Am→Dm→F→G→Am progression together. Energy remains flat at 0.6-0.7 throughout — steady, predictable, habituatable background music for deep concentration.

tracks.name: Sawtooth Lead
tracks.frequencyRole: Lead voice in MIDI 60-76 range (C4-E5). Pentatonic A minor melody using chord tones on downbeats. Gentle, repetitive 4-bar motif that loops with minimal variation to support habituation.

tracks.name: Synth Bass
tracks.frequencyRole: Foundation in MIDI 33-45 range (A1-A2). Plays chord roots with steady whole/half notes on each chord change. Anchors the harmonic progression and provides a warm, low-end pulse.

tracks.name: Warm Pad

tracks.name: Subtle Drums
tracks.frequencyRole: Percussive texture using soft hi-hat (42) and rim click (37) only. Barely perceptible pulse at velocity 30-42. Provides subtle rhythmic grounding without drawing attention.

sequences.mixStrategy: Three-layer frequency separation: Synth Bass (GM 38) anchors the low end (MIDI 36-48, C2-C3) with slow sustained root notes; Warm Pad (GM 89) fills the harmonic body (MIDI 48-67, C3-G4) with wide voicings changing every 8-16 seconds; Sawtooth Lead (GM 81) floats above (MIDI 60-77, C4-F5) with gentle arch-shaped phrases. All tracks follow the same Cm chord progression: i (Cm) → iv (Fm) → bVI (Ab) → bVII (Bb) → i (Cm) → iv (Fm) → i (Cm). Rhythmic interplay is minimal — bass and pad sustain while melody gently moves in between, ensuring never more than 4-5 simultaneous notes. Energy arc: 0.3 → 0.5 → 0.6 → 0.5 → 0.4 → 0.3 over 45 seconds.

tracks.name: Synth Bass Foundation
tracks.frequencyRole: Low foundation: MIDI 36-48 (C2-C3). Plays chord roots with long sustained notes, one per chord change. Provides warm harmonic grounding without rhythmic drive.

tracks.name: Warm Pad Harmonics
tracks.frequencyRole: Harmonic body: MIDI 48-67 (C3-G4). Wide pad voicings with 2-3 notes per chord, changing every 8-16 seconds. Fills midrange warmth without cluttering melody space.

tracks.name: Sawtooth Lead Melody
tracks.frequencyRole: Lead voice: MIDI 60-77 (C4-F5). Gentle arch-shaped phrases that rise and fall, hitting chord tones on strong beats. Sparse and breathing, 2-3 notes per phrase with long durations.

sequences.mixStrategy: Ultra-sparse, low-register layering with maximum frequency separation. Bass provides a warm sub-foundation (C1-C3), pad chords fill the harmonic body (C3-C5 but staying below C5), and sawtooth melody floats gently in the C4 range. No rhythmic pulse — all notes overlap with staggered, free-floating entries. Note density kept to 1-2 new notes every 4-8 seconds. Chord changes occur every ~16 seconds (Am → Dm → F → G → Am) creating near-static harmony. Energy starts at 0.4 and gently descends to 0.2 by the end — velocities gradually decrease and note durations lengthen. All tracks breathe together, creating a warm blanket of sound that induces deep sleep.

tracks.name: Sawtooth Lead - Descending Sleep Melody
tracks.frequencyRole: Lead voice in C4 range (MIDI 60-72). Gentle descending phrases with long sustained tones. Stays below C5 (MIDI 72) to maintain warmth and darkness.

tracks.name: Synth Bass - Deep Foundation
tracks.frequencyRole: Sub-foundation in C1-C3 range (MIDI 33-48). Plays chord roots with extremely long sustained tones. Provides warmth and grounding weight beneath the mix.

tracks.name: Warm Pad - Floating Harmonic Bed
tracks.frequencyRole: Harmonic body in C3-C4 range (MIDI 48-65). Sustained chord voicings with 2-3 notes max, changing every ~16 seconds. Creates a warm, enveloping blanket of harmony.

sequences.mixStrategy: Frequency-separated layering: Bass (MIDI 36-48) anchors the low end with steady root notes on beats 1 and 3; Chords (MIDI 52-67) fill the mid-range with sustained warm pads changing every 4-8 seconds; Melody (MIDI 64-76) floats above with gentle pentatonic vibraphone motifs at moderate velocity; Drums provide a subtle side-stick and soft closed hi-hat pattern at very low velocity to create a steady pulse without grabbing attention. All tracks follow the same Am→Fmaj→Gmaj (i→bVI→bVII) chord progression together, with bass always on chord roots. Energy stays flat at 0.6-0.7 throughout — no builds, no drops, pure background wallpaper for deep focus.

tracks.name: Vibraphone Melody
tracks.frequencyRole: Lead voice MIDI 64-76 (C4-E5). Gentle pentatonic phrases using chord tones on strong beats. Repetitive 2-bar motif with minimal variation. Sits above chords spectrally.

tracks.name: Synth Bass
tracks.frequencyRole: Foundation MIDI 36-48 (C2-C3). Plays chord roots on beats 1 and 3 with steady rhythm. Anchors the harmonic progression. No melodic movement — pure root support.

tracks.name: Warm Pad Chords
tracks.frequencyRole: Harmonic body MIDI 52-67 (E3-G4). Sustained pad voicings changing every 6.4s following i→bVI→bVII progression. Warm, wide voicings that fill the mid-range without competing with melody or bass.

tracks.name: Subtle Drums
tracks.frequencyRole: Rhythmic pulse using GM percussion. Soft closed hi-hat (42) on eighth notes and side-stick/rim click (37) on beats 2 and 4. All velocities 30-45 to stay subliminal. Steady metronomic pattern the brain habituates to.

sequences.mixStrategy: Three-layer frequency separation: Synth Bass anchors the low end (MIDI 36-48, C2-C3) with slow root notes, Warm Pad fills the harmonic middle (MIDI 53-67, F3-G4) with sustained open voicings changing every 8-16 seconds, and Vibraphone floats gentle arch-shaped melodies in the upper register (MIDI 62-77, D4-F5). All layers follow the same Dm dorian progression: Dm (0-16s) → Bb (16-24s) → C (24-32s) → Bb (32-40s) → Dm (40-45s). Note density kept sparse (2-4 new notes per 4 seconds) with long durations (2-8s) ensuring no more than 4-5 simultaneous voices. Energy arc rises gently from 0.3 to 0.6 at the midpoint then settles back to 0.3. Hip-hop flavor expressed through minor pentatonic/dorian color tones and i→bVI→bVII harmonic movement, never through rhythmic intensity.

tracks.name: Vibraphone Melody
tracks.frequencyRole: Lead voice in MIDI 62-77 (D4-F5). Gentle arch-shaped phrases using Dm dorian/minor pentatonic tones. Floats above the pad and bass with soft, shimmering articulations.

tracks.name: Synth Bass
tracks.frequencyRole: Foundation in MIDI 36-48 (C2-C3). Plays chord roots with long, sustained tones. Slow and grounding, providing warmth underneath the pad and melody.

sequences.mixStrategy: Ultra-sparse, low-register layering for deep sleep. Bass provides a warm sub-foundation (C1-C3) with long sustained root notes. Warm Pad chords sit in the C3-C5 range with slow, ghostly voicings that blend into the bass harmonics. Vibraphone melody floats in C4-C5 with predominantly descending motion, placed spectrally above the pad but never piercing. All tracks share the same near-static harmonic rhythm (chord changes every ~16-22 seconds): Cm → Abmaj → Bbmaj (i → bVI → bVII). No rhythmic pulse — notes drift in freely with staggered entrances. Maximum 3-4 notes sounding simultaneously. Energy arc: 0.4 at start, gently fading to 0.2 by end. Everything whisper-quiet, like a warm blanket of sound dissolving into darkness.

sequences.mixStrategy: Frequency-separated layering: Bass (MIDI 34-46) anchors the low end with steady root notes on beats 1 and 3; Chords (MIDI 53-67) fill the mid-range with sustained jazz voicings (ii7-V7-Imaj7) changing every 4-8 seconds; Melody (MIDI 65-77) floats pentatonic phrases in the upper-mid range with gentle repetition; Drums provide a barely-perceptible side-stick/hi-hat pulse at very low velocity. All tracks lock to the same chord progression (Cm7→F7→Bbmaj7→Gm7 turnaround) changing together every 4.8s. Energy stays flat at 0.6-0.65 throughout — warm, steady, habituable background wallpaper.

tracks.frequencyRole: Upper-mid lead voice, MIDI 65-77 (F4-F5). Pentatonic phrases using Bb pentatonic (Bb, C, D, F, G) hitting chord tones on downbeats. Gentle, repetitive 2-bar motif with minimal variation.

tracks.name: Acoustic Bass - Foundation
tracks.frequencyRole: Low-end foundation, MIDI 34-46 (Bb1-Bb2). Plays chord roots on beats 1 and 3 with occasional passing tone on beat 4. Steady, predictable half-note pulse anchoring the harmony.

tracks.name: Brushed Drums - Subtle Pulse
tracks.frequencyRole: Percussive texture layer. Side stick (37) and closed hi-hat (42) only. Barely perceptible steady pulse at velocity 30-42. Provides gentle rhythmic grid for brain entrainment without drawing attention.

All layers follow the same chord progression (Dm9→G13→Cmaj9→Am9→Dm9→G13→Cmaj9→Fmaj9→Dm9→G13→Cmaj9) changing every ~8-10 seconds. Rhythmic staggering ensures no more than 4-5 notes sound simultaneously. Energy arc: 0.3→0.5→0.6→0.5→0.4→0.3. All velocities 35-60, durations 2-8s, gentle and floating.

tracks.frequencyRole: Lead voice: MIDI 60-79 (C4-G5). Gentle arch-shaped phrases with jazz intervals (9ths, 6ths). Sits above pad and bass, never competes spectrally.

sequences.mixStrategy: Ultra-sparse, slow-moving jazz voicings in low registers only. Bass provides deep root tones (C1-C3), warm pad sustains extended jazz chords (C3-C5 but constrained below C5), piano melody floats descending lines in C4-C5 range. All tracks change chords together every ~16-24 seconds following a sleepy ii7→V7→Imaj7 progression in F Dorian/Mixolydian. No rhythmic pulse — notes drift in freely with staggered entries. Maximum 3-4 notes sounding at once across all tracks. Energy starts at 0.4 and descends to 0.2 by end. Spectral separation: bass owns sub-low, pad fills warm mid-low, piano sits just above pad. Velocities decrease over time for a settling, sleep-inducing arc.

tracks.name: Dreamy Jazz Piano
tracks.frequencyRole: Lead voice in C4-C5 range (MIDI 60-72). Descending melodic motion throughout — gentle jazz phrases settling downward. Stays below C5 to maintain warmth and darkness for sleep.

tracks.frequencyRole: Deep foundation in C1-C3 range (MIDI 24-48). Plays chord roots with very long sustains. Anchors the harmonic progression: Gm7 (G) → C7 (C) → Fmaj7 (F). Sub-bass warmth for sleep immersion.

sequences.mixStrategy: Frequency-separated mix: Bass (C2-C3) provides steady root foundation, Piano chords (C3-C5) play gentle montuno patterns in the mid range, Flute melody (C4-C5) floats above with pentatonic-flavored lines using harmonic minor color tones, Drums (side stick + soft hi-hat only) provide subtle pulse at low velocity. All tracks follow Andalusian progression (Am→G→F→E) changing every 4 bars (3.2s per chord). Energy remains flat at 0.65 throughout — steady, predictable, non-attention-grabbing wallpaper music for deep focus.

tracks.name: Latin Flute - Focus Melody
tracks.frequencyRole: Lead voice: MIDI 60-76 (C4-E5). Pentatonic-flavored phrases from A harmonic minor. Hits chord tones on strong beats. Gentle, breathy, repeating motif with minimal variation. Velocity 50-65.

tracks.name: Electric Bass - Steady Root Foundation
tracks.frequencyRole: Foundation: MIDI 33-48 (A1-C3). Plays chord roots in steady half/whole note rhythm. Anchors the Andalusian progression Am→G→F→E. Velocity 55-65. Predictable, warm pulse.

tracks.name: Piano - Gentle Montuno Chords
tracks.frequencyRole: Harmonic body: MIDI 48-67 (C3-G4). Soft montuno-style voicings following Andalusian cadence Am→G→F→E. Chord changes every ~6.4s. Light syncopation but steady and predictable. Velocity 45-60.

tracks.name: Subtle Percussion - Side Stick & Hi-Hat
tracks.frequencyRole: Percussion texture: Side stick (MIDI 37) and closed hi-hat (MIDI 42) only. Ultra-soft pulse at velocity 30-42. Steady pattern that brain habituates to. No kick or snare — too attention-grabbing for focus mode.

sequences.mixStrategy: Three-layer frequency separation: Bass (MIDI 36-48) provides warm, slow-moving root notes anchoring the harmony; Chords/Piano (MIDI 48-67) delivers gentle, spread voicings with soft Latin-flavored Andalusian progressions changing every 8-12 seconds; Melody/Flute (MIDI 65-79) floats above in gentle arch-shaped phrases with breathy, sparse lines. All layers breathe together with minimal overlap in attack times to keep density at 3-5 simultaneous notes max. Energy arc: 0.3→0.5→0.6→0.5→0.4→0.3 across 45 seconds. Latin flavor comes through harmonic minor color tones and subtle syncopation in piano, but rhythm stays flowing and unhurried throughout.

tracks.name: Latin Flute Melody
tracks.frequencyRole: Lead voice, MIDI 65-79 (F4-G5). Gentle arch-shaped phrases that rise and fall slowly. Sparse, breathy, with 2-3 second gaps between phrases. Chord tones on downbeats, passing tones from D harmonic minor for Latin color.

tracks.name: Warm Electric Bass
tracks.frequencyRole: Foundation layer, MIDI 38-48 (D2-C3). Plays chord roots with slow, sustained whole and half notes. Minimal movement, anchoring the Andalusian progression: Dm→C→Bb→A. Warm and round tone.

tracks.name: Gentle Latin Piano Chords
tracks.frequencyRole: Harmonic body, MIDI 50-67 (D3-G4). Soft, spread voicings with gentle Andalusian cadence: i→bVII→bVI→V. Very subtle montuno-inspired broken chords but played slowly and gently, never driving. 2-3 notes per voicing to keep density low.

sequences.mixStrategy: Ultra-sparse, low-register layering. Bass provides a warm sub-foundation (C1-C3) with long, slowly fading root notes. Piano chords sit in the C3-C5 range as soft, widely-spaced voicings (no more than 3 notes per chord) that bloom and decay over 16-32 seconds. Flute melody floats in C4-C5 with descending phrases using harmonic minor intervals, never exceeding 2 simultaneous notes with the chords. All tracks use staggered entrances so notes overlap gently without creating rhythmic pulse. Spectral separation ensures no masking: bass below 200Hz, piano 200-800Hz, flute 800Hz+. Energy arc descends from 0.4 to 0.2 across 45 seconds — velocity and density both decrease toward the end.

tracks.name: Latin Flute — Descending Sleep Melody
tracks.frequencyRole: Lead voice in C4-C5 range (MIDI 60-72). Descending motion throughout, using A harmonic minor intervals (A, G#, F, E). Stays well below C5 to preserve warmth. Sparse, floating phrases with no rhythmic pulse.

tracks.name: Electric Bass — Andalusian Roots
tracks.frequencyRole: Deep foundation in C2-C3 range (MIDI 36-48). Plays chord roots of Andalusian cadence: Am(A)→G(G)→F(F)→E(E). Extremely long sustained notes, one per chord change every ~11 seconds. Warm, dark, enveloping low end.

tracks.name: Piano — Warm Harmonic Minor Pads
tracks.frequencyRole: Harmonic body in C3-C5 range (MIDI 48-72). Widely-spaced Andalusian voicings: Am (A-C-E) → G (G-B-D) → F (F-A-C) → E (E-G#-B). Max 2-3 notes per voicing, staggered entry. Extremely soft, pad-like sustained chords changing every ~11 seconds.

sequences.mixStrategy: Frequency-separated layering: Bass anchors the low end (C2-C3) with steady root notes on beats 1 and 3, Warm Pad fills the mid-range (C3-C5) with soft sustained jazz 7th voicings changing every 4-8 seconds, Electric Piano melody floats above (C4-C6) with gentle pentatonic phrases at moderate velocity, and subtle drums (side stick + soft closed hi-hat) provide a steady predictable pulse at low velocity. All tracks lock to the same ii7→V7→Imaj7 chord progression in C. Energy remains flat at 0.6-0.7 throughout — no builds, no drops, just warm consistent background texture the brain can habituate to.

tracks.name: Lofi Electric Piano Melody
tracks.frequencyRole: Lead voice: MIDI 60-76 (C4-E5). Gentle pentatonic phrases using chord tones on downbeats. Soft, unhurried, repetitive motifs with minimal variation.

tracks.name: Lofi Electric Bass
tracks.frequencyRole: Foundation: MIDI 36-48 (C2-C3). Plays chord roots on beats 1 and 3 with steady, predictable rhythm. Anchors the harmonic progression.

tracks.name: Lofi Warm Pad Chords
tracks.frequencyRole: Harmonic body: MIDI 48-67 (C3-G4). Sustained jazz 7th voicings (ii7→V7→Imaj7) changing every ~6 seconds. Soft, warm, enveloping.

tracks.name: Lofi Subtle Drums
tracks.frequencyRole: Texture/pulse: Side stick (MIDI 37) and soft closed hi-hat (MIDI 42) only. Velocity 30-45. Steady metronomic pattern for subconscious pulse. No kick or snare to avoid attention-grabbing.

sequences.mixStrategy: Three-layer spectral separation: Bass (MIDI 36-48) provides warm foundation with slow root movements; Chords/Pad (MIDI 48-67) fills the harmonic middle with soft jazz 7th voicings, voiced openly to avoid muddiness; Melody/EP (MIDI 60-77) floats above with gentle arch-shaped phrases. All layers breathe together with staggered entries to keep max polyphony at 4-5 notes. Energy arc: 0.3→0.5→0.6→0.5→0.4→0.3. Chord changes every ~8-10 seconds. Lofi warmth in timbre only — dynamics and density strictly serve relaxation.

tracks.name: Lofi Electric Piano Melody
tracks.frequencyRole: Lead voice: MIDI 60-77 (C4-F5). Gentle arch-shaped phrases with stepwise motion, landing on chord tones on strong beats. Sparse and breathing.

tracks.name: Lofi Electric Bass
tracks.frequencyRole: Foundation: MIDI 36-48 (C2-C3). Plays chord roots with long sustained tones, occasional gentle octave movement. Warm and grounding.

tracks.name: Lofi Warm Pad Chords
tracks.frequencyRole: Harmonic body: MIDI 48-67 (C3-G4). Open jazz 7th voicings (Gm7, C7, Fmaj7, Dm7) with slow attacks. 2-3 notes per voicing to stay under polyphony limit.

sequences.mixStrategy: Ultra-sparse, floating textures with no rhythmic pulse. Bass provides a warm low-frequency foundation (C1-C3), changing roots only every 16-32 seconds. Warm Pad chords sit in the mid register (C3-C5) with gentle jazz 7th voicings, swelling in and out like slow breathing. Electric Piano melody floats above (C4-C5) with predominantly descending motion, placing sparse chord tones that settle downward. All three layers are spectrally separated to avoid masking. Energy begins at 0.4 and gently descends to 0.2 by the end. Maximum 3-4 notes sounding simultaneously at any moment. Note onsets are staggered across tracks to avoid rhythmic coincidence, creating a weightless, drifting quality.

tracks.name: Lofi Electric Piano - Descending Melody
tracks.frequencyRole: Lead voice in C4-C5 range (MIDI 60-72). Sparse, descending phrases using chord tones. Sits above pad and bass with no spectral overlap. Predominantly stepwise descending motion to induce settling.

tracks.name: Lofi Electric Bass - Root Foundation
tracks.frequencyRole: Warm low-frequency foundation in C2-C3 range (MIDI 36-48). Plays chord roots with extremely long sustained tones. Changes only every 16-32 seconds to maintain near-static harmony. No spectral overlap with pad or melody.

tracks.name: Lofi Warm Pad - Jazz 7th Voicings
tracks.frequencyRole: Harmonic body in C3-C5 range (MIDI 48-67). Slow-breathing jazz 7th chord voicings (Fm7, Bb7, Ebmaj7 in dorian context). Chords change every 16-32 seconds. Sits between bass and melody spectrally. Maximum 2-3 chord tones sounding at once.

sequences.mixStrategy: Bass provides steady root foundation in low register (C2-C3), organ chords sit in mid register (C3-C5) with gentle offbeat stabs at low velocity for reggae color without disrupting focus, nylon guitar melody floats above in C4-C5 pentatonic range with long sustained tones and minimal variation, drums use only side stick and soft closed hi-hat for subtle pulse. All tracks change chords together on a I-IV-V-I progression in G major, changing every 4-8 beats. Spectral separation ensures no masking: bass below 48, chords 48-67, melody 60-76. Energy flat at 0.6-0.7 throughout — warm, predictable, habituatable wallpaper.

tracks.name: Nylon Guitar Melody
tracks.frequencyRole: Lead voice in C4-C5 pentatonic range (MIDI 60-76). Plays chord tones on strong beats with long sustained notes (1-4s). Minimal variation, repetitive 4-bar motif that repeats throughout. Stays predictable and non-attention-grabbing.

tracks.name: Electric Bass
tracks.frequencyRole: Foundation in C2-C3 range (MIDI 36-48). Plays chord roots with steady, predictable rhythm. Half-note and whole-note feel. Roots: G=43, C=48, D=38. Locks with chord changes every 6.4s (8 beats at 75bpm).

tracks.name: Organ Chords
tracks.frequencyRole: Harmonic body in C3-C5 range (MIDI 48-67). Gentle offbeat chord stabs for reggae skank color, but at low velocity (45-58) to stay backgrounded. Chords: G=55,59,62 | C=60,64,67 | D=50,54,57. Changes every 6.4s aligned with bass.

tracks.name: Subtle Percussion
tracks.frequencyRole: Minimal percussion texture. Side stick (rim=37) on beats 2 and 4 for reggae one-drop feel, closed hi-hat (42) on upbeats — all at very low velocity (30-42) to serve as subliminal pulse without grabbing attention.

sequences.mixStrategy: Three-layer frequency separation: Bass (MIDI 36-48) provides warm, slow-moving root foundation; Organ chords (MIDI 48-67) sit in the mid-range with gentle offbeat swells at low velocity creating a soft reggae-flavored harmonic bed; Nylon guitar melody (MIDI 60-79) floats above with arching phrases. All layers use long, overlapping durations (2-8s) to create a floating, connected texture. Dynamics follow energy arc 0.3→0.5→0.6→0.5→0.4→0.3 across 45 seconds. Chord changes every ~8-10 seconds following I(C)→IV(F)→V(G)→IV(F)→I(C) progression. No percussive attacks; everything breathes gently.

tracks.name: Nylon Guitar Melody
tracks.frequencyRole: Lead voice in MIDI 60-79 (C4-G5). Gentle arch-shaped phrases that rise and fall. Plays chord tones on strong beats, passing tones between. Floats above the harmonic bed.

tracks.name: Electric Bass Foundation
tracks.frequencyRole: Foundation layer in MIDI 36-48 (C2-C3). Plays chord roots with long sustained tones. Slow, breathing rhythm anchoring the harmony. Warm and deep.

tracks.name: Organ Chords (Reggae Offbeat Pads)
tracks.frequencyRole: Harmonic body in MIDI 48-67 (C3-G4). Gentle offbeat chord swells inspired by reggae skank but stretched into soft pad-like voicings. 2-3 notes per voicing to avoid density. Changes with progression.

sequences.mixStrategy: Ultra-sparse, low-register layering for deep sleep. Bass provides a warm, barely-perceptible foundation in the C1-C3 range with long sustained root notes. Organ chords sit in the C3-C5 range as a soft, near-static harmonic blanket with gentle voicings. Nylon guitar melody floats in C4-C5 with predominantly descending motion, creating a settling, sinking sensation. All three tracks share the same slow I→IV→I→V progression changing every ~16 seconds. No rhythmic pulse — notes drift in freely with staggered entries to avoid density spikes. Maximum 3-4 notes sounding simultaneously. Energy starts at 0.4 and gently descends to 0.2 by the end. Reggae influence is limited to mixolydian color tones and instrument choices only.

tracks.name: Nylon Guitar - Descending Sleep Melody
tracks.frequencyRole: Lead voice in C4-C5 range (MIDI 60-72). Predominantly descending lines that settle downward, evoking a sinking-into-sleep sensation. Sparse, floating phrases with no rhythmic pulse.

tracks.name: Electric Bass - Warm Root Foundation
tracks.frequencyRole: Deep foundation in C1-C3 range (MIDI 31-48). Plays chord roots as long, warm sustained tones. Provides gravitational anchor for the harmonic progression. Very slow movement.

tracks.name: Organ - Soft Harmonic Blanket
tracks.frequencyRole: Harmonic body in C3-C5 range (MIDI 48-72). Very slow, near-static chord pads using reggae-influenced I-IV-V voicings in G mixolydian. Chords change approximately every 16 seconds. Soft, enveloping warmth.

sequences.mixStrategy: Full spectrum separation: Bass (C1-C3) provides driving foundation locked to kick drum, Chords (C3-C5) fill harmonic body with power chord voicings, Melody (C4-C6) cuts through with punchy short phrases. Drums drive relentless energy with kick on 1&3, snare on 2&4, and steady hi-hat 8ths. All tracks follow shared chord progression (Em→D→C→D→Em→G→C→D) changing every 2 bars (~4.17s). Energy arc builds from 0.5→0.7→0.8→0.9→1.0→0.7 across 45 seconds. Dense note patterns maintain forward momentum throughout.

tracks.name: Rock Lead Guitar
tracks.frequencyRole: Lead voice MIDI 60-84 (C4-C6). Punchy short notes 0.2-1.5s, velocity 65-100. Hits chord tones on strong beats, fills with pentatonic runs.

tracks.name: Driving Electric Bass
tracks.frequencyRole: Foundation MIDI 24-48 (C1-C3). Locked to kick drum on beats 1&3. Velocity 80-100. Root notes of chords with driving 8th-note patterns.

tracks.name: Power Chord Pad
tracks.frequencyRole: Harmonic body MIDI 48-72 (C3-C5). Root+5th power chord voicings changing every ~4s. Velocity 70-95. Sustained chords providing harmonic foundation.

tracks.name: Rock Drums
tracks.frequencyRole: Full percussion spectrum. Kick (36) on beats 1&3, snare (38) on 2&4, hi-hat (42) on 8th notes throughout. Driving rock beat at 115 BPM. Each beat = 0.5217s.

sequences.mixStrategy: Frequency-separated layering: Bass (MIDI 28-40) anchors the low end with steady root notes on beats 1 and 3; Chords (MIDI 52-67) provide a warm harmonic bed with slow sustained pads changing every 4-8 seconds; Melody (MIDI 64-76) floats a pentatonic motif in the upper-mid range with gentle repetition and minimal variation; Drums use only side stick and soft closed hi-hat at very low velocity for subtle pulse. All tracks lock to the same Em→C→D→Em progression (i→bVI→bVII→i), changing together every 4.8 seconds (6 beats at 75 BPM). Energy stays flat at 0.6-0.7 throughout — steady, predictable, habituatable background texture. No track competes for attention; each occupies its own spectral lane.

tracks.name: Clean Guitar Melody
tracks.frequencyRole: Upper-mid register (MIDI 64-76, C4-E5). Pentatonic motif repeating with minimal variation. Sits above chords, never clashing. Gentle and unhurried.

tracks.name: Electric Bass
tracks.frequencyRole: Low register (MIDI 28-40, E1-E2). Plays chord roots on beats 1 and 3, steady and predictable. Anchors harmonic foundation below all other tracks.

tracks.name: Warm Pad Chords
tracks.frequencyRole: Mid register (MIDI 52-67, E3-G4). Sustained root+5th voicings providing warm harmonic bed. Changes every 4.8s aligned with progression. Fills spectral space between bass and melody.

tracks.name: Subtle Drums
tracks.frequencyRole: Percussion layer. Side stick (MIDI 37) and soft closed hi-hat (MIDI 42) only. Very low velocity (30-45) for subliminal pulse. No kick or snare to avoid attention-grabbing transients.

sequences.mixStrategy: Three-layer spectral separation: Bass (MIDI 36-48) provides a warm, slow-moving foundation with whole-note root tones; Chords/Pad (MIDI 48-67) fills the harmonic body with sustained open 5th voicings changing every 8-16 seconds; Melody/Clean Guitar (MIDI 64-79) floats above with gentle arch-shaped phrases. All tracks follow the same chord progression (Am → F → G → F → Am → G → F → Am) changing together. Dynamics follow a 0.3→0.5→0.6→0.5→0.4→0.3 energy arc across 45 seconds. Note density kept to 2-4 new notes per 4 seconds max, never more than 4-5 notes sounding simultaneously. Rock flavor expressed only through minor pentatonic melody choices and simple root+5th chord voicings — never through driving rhythm or high energy.

tracks.name: Clean Guitar Melody
tracks.frequencyRole: Lead voice in MIDI 64-79 (E4-G5). Gentle arch-shaped phrases using A minor pentatonic (A, C, D, E, G). Sits clearly above pad chords, no spectral masking with bass.

tracks.name: Electric Bass Foundation
tracks.frequencyRole: Foundation in MIDI 36-48 (C2-C3). Plays chord roots as slow sustained tones. Warm low-end presence without muddiness, well below pad and melody ranges.

tracks.name: Warm Pad Chords
tracks.frequencyRole: Harmonic body in MIDI 48-67 (C3-G4). Sustained open root+5th voicings with gentle attack. Sits between bass and melody, providing warm harmonic bed without crowding either layer.

sequences.mixStrategy: Ultra-sparse, floating arrangement with no rhythmic pulse. Bass provides a deep, warm foundation in the low register with slow root notes. Pad chords sustain near-static harmony with simple root+5th voicings, changing every 16-32 seconds. Clean guitar melody floats above with predominantly descending motion using minor pentatonic tones. All three tracks are spectrally separated: bass (C1-C3), chords (C3-C5), melody (C4-C5). Maximum 3-4 notes sounding simultaneously. Energy gently descends from 0.4 to 0.2 over 45 seconds. No rhythmic grid — notes drift in freely like breathing.

tracks.name: Clean Guitar Melody
tracks.frequencyRole: Lead voice in mid register (MIDI 60-76, C4-E5). Predominantly descending minor pentatonic phrases that settle downward like falling asleep. Sparse, floating, no rhythmic pulse.

tracks.name: Electric Bass Foundation
tracks.frequencyRole: Deep foundation in low register (MIDI 33-48, A1-C3). Plays chord roots with very long sustained tones. Anchors the harmony with warmth and weight. Barely perceptible rumble.

tracks.name: Warm Pad Chords
tracks.frequencyRole: Harmonic body in mid-low register (MIDI 48-67, C3-G4). Simple root+5th voicings from rock harmonic vocabulary (Am, G, F). Near-static sustains that shift like slow clouds. Envelops the listener in warmth.
